prerequisites: A Simplecast account with access to the dashboard (the API token is generated from your Private Apps page at https://dashboard.simplecast.com/account/private-apps).
An API token generated from the Private Apps page, which authorizes requests to the Simplecast API.
Network access to the Simplecast API at https://api.simplecast.com.

authMethods.name: API token (Bearer)
authMethods.summary: Simplecast uses bearer-token authentication. Provide your API token in the connector's `api_token` field. The connector sends it on every request as an `authorization: Bearer {token}` header against https://api.simplecast.com. Get the token from your Private Apps page in the Simplecast dashboard.

setupSteps.title: Generate an API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to the Simplecast dashboard and open your Private Apps page (https://dashboard.simplecast.com/account/private-apps). Create or copy an API token there. This token is used as the bearer token for all API requests.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Enter the token in the connector's required `api_token` field. It is a secret value, so store it securely. The connector authenticates by sending it as `authorization: Bearer {token}`.

setupSteps.title: Verify connectivity
setupSteps.body: Confirm the token works by listing podcasts, for example: `curl https://api.simplecast.com/podcasts -H 'authorization: Bearer {token}'`. A successful JSON response confirms the credential is valid and the connector can read your Simplecast data.
